ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each options contract */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the options contract */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the options contract */,
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying asset (e.g., stock, index, commodity) */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of options contract (e.g., call, put) */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Last trade price of the options contract */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Total number of outstanding contracts */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the options contract */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contract was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_contracts_underlying_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_asset_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underlying asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the underlying asset (e.g., stock, index, commodity) */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Last trade price of the underlying asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the underlying asset */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the asset was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market price record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "price" REAL /* Market price of the options contract */,
  "bid_size" INTEGER /* Size of the bid */,
  "ask_size" INTEGER /* Size of the ask */,
  "last_trade_size" INTEGER /* Size of the last trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market price record */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price record was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_prices_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES options_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greeks" (
  "greek_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each greek record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta value of the options contract */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value of the options contract */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value of the options contract */,
  "vega" REAL /* Vega value of the options contract */,
  "rho" REAL /* Rho value of the options contract */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the Greeks record was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the Greeks record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greek_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greeks_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES options_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trader */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trader */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trader account was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trader account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trader_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader account */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the trader account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used by the trader */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the account was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_accounts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader account */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "position_size" INTEGER /* Size of the position */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Price at which the position was entered */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Price at which the position was exited */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the position was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trader_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES options_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader account */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "order_size" INTEGER /* Size of the order */,
  "order_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "execution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was executed */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES options_contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trader_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, closed, cancelled) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order status record */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status record was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the trader */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., order, position, market) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "bid" REAL /* Bid price of the options contract */,
  "ask" REAL /* Ask price of the options contract */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the options contract */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the options contract */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the options contract */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the options contract */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the market data record was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES options_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log record */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., order placement, position update) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)
